measures.jurisdiction: Whatcom County Fire Protection District No. 1
measures.title: Levy Lid Lift
measures.what_it_does: Lifts the fire district levy lid with a 106% limit factor for nine years (Everson/Nooksack area).

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.

measures.jurisdiction: Glacier Fire and Rescue (Whatcom County Fire Protection District No. 19)
measures.title: Regular Property Tax Levy
measures.what_it_does: Sets the fire district's regular levy with a 104% limit factor for six years.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.

measures.jurisdiction: Whatcom County Fire Protection District No. 21
measures.title: Regular Property Tax Levy
measures.what_it_does: Sets the fire district's regular levy with a 103% limit factor for five years.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.

measures.jurisdiction: Skagit County Public Hospital District No. 304 (United General)
measures.title: Levy Lid Lift
measures.what_it_does: Lifts the cross-county hospital district's regular levy lid for 2027 collection.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.
